title: Portfolio
description: A responsive personal resume website built with Node.js, showcasing my projects, skills, and experience through a modern and interactive interface. The site features dynamic components, including project displays and smooth UI interactions, designed to provide a clear and engaging overview of my work

title: Spending-Saver
description: This project analyzes user spending data and uses AI to classify purchases as essential vs non-essential, then calculates: Daily waste, Weekly / Monthly / Yearly projections, and Personalized financial insights

title: School System Database
description: Small prototype implementing full-stack web development including backend support through SQL database and frontend interaction. Used Flask to handle routing and API requests

title: AI Study
description: Small project including multiple aspects of modern AI design. Most notably, used a neural network along with the IRIS dataset to train a network in predicting flower class based on properties of petals
